reviews.comment:
Podrían cambiar la dirección para entrar a cargar nafta
Ahora se hacen tacos tanto por la Alvear y S.perez además los snr con plata se quieren llevar el mundo por delante si no pueden salir

(Translated by Google)
They could change the direction for entering to refuel. Now there are traffic jams on both Alvear and S. Perez, and the rich kids think they can do whatever they want if they can't get out of the car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQdTU3QXBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente, baños limpios, playa de estacionamiento sin cargos extras, la atención amable y dedicada de los empleados y el Sr Franco se destaca. Muchas gracias por hacer nuestro viaje más placentero!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean restrooms, free parking, and the friendly, dedicated staff—especially Mr. Franco—were outstanding. Thank you so much for making our trip so much more enjoyable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQOE9Hc3lRRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
La nafta mas nefasta de la provincia, segunda vez que me pasa con autos distintos, si sos miembro del club (ACA) no podes ni estacionar el auto, los beneficios son para los de bs as parece

(Translated by Google)
The worst gasoline in the province, second time this has happened to me with different cars, if you are a member of the club (ACA) you can't even park your car, the benefits are for those from Buenos Aires it seems

reviews.comment:
